item.title: CLARITY Act misses Senate July floor vote; August 7 becomes final window before congressional recess closes crypto bill's path.
SEC advances three crypto rule proposals on token offerings, broker-dealer custody, and trading venues for July release.
UK Treasury unveils tokenization taskforce with BlackRock, Goldman Sachs, JPMorgan, and Morgan Stanley among 50-plus firms.
Morgan Stanley launches spot bitcoin, ether, and solana trading on E*TRADE at 50bps via Zero Hash custody.
US government moves $288M in seized bitcoin and ether to Coinbase Prime custody.
BIS research finds a $3.5B stablecoin inflow cuts 3-month Treasury bill yields by up to 4 basis points within 10 days.
Australia mandates Travel Rule identity and wallet checks on all regulated crypto exchange transfers effective July 1.
DTCC targets October 2026 launch of tokenized securities settlement platform with limited production trades beginning in July.
JPMorgan warns rushed US crypto rules ahead of CLARITY Act Senate vote risk creating unintended market loopholes.
Deutsche Bank to launch crypto custody service with Bitpanda in 2026, covering bitcoin and ether, pending BaFin approval.
Kraken introduces USD-settled bitcoin and ether options via request-for-quote on Kraken Pro, targeting retail derivatives access.
